examples: Smugness and evasion over history are widespread in Europe.
It is a strange mix of protective sororal sympathy and smugness.
Eurosceptics, including senior Conservatives, are torn between smugness and anger.
There was neither disappointment in loss nor smugness in victory, just a silent, respectful return to their positions.
But that amounts to the sin of smugness, not dreams of playing Athens to America's Rome.
